name: code-gate
description: Maintainer decision protocol with gated review and live case files for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run maintainer gates with live case files
interface.longDescription: Use Code Gate to inspect status, choose the next gate, and run one maintainer review gate at a time while keeping a root-level case file current across Codex and Codex IDE sessions.
defaultPrompt: Suggest the next Code Gate step
Run a Code Gate review for this task
